channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Berkshire annual meeting recap: Buffett says investing environment not ideal, sees 'gambling' in markets
item.description: Warren Buffett has loomed large at Berkshire Hathaway's annual shareholder meetings. Greg Abel tackled a wide array of topics in his first as CEO.

item.title: Spirit Airlines shuts down after failing to reach a bailout deal, ending discount travel era
item.description: Talks with bondholders for a government bailout this week failed to yield a deal.

item.title: After Spirit collapse, Duffy says there's no need for government budget airline bailout
item.description: Duffy said he does not think the government needs to bail out low-cost airlines that have sought $2.5 billion in government relief because of high fuel prices.

item.title: Iran offers Strait of Hormuz deal; Trump dissatisfied but prefers non-military path
item.description: Trump said he was not satisfied ​with the latest Iranian proposal. Iran's foreign minister said Tehran was ready for diplomacy if U.S. changes its approach.

item.title: These stocks reporting next week have earnings momentum on their side
item.description: Stocks reporting earnings next week that are also seeing accelerating earnings momentum include Datadog and Block.

item.title: Danco Laboratories seeks Supreme Court stay of ruling pausing mail-order access to abortion drugs
item.description: Danco filed an application with the U.S. Supreme Court, asking for a stay of a ruling that temporarily blocks mail-order access to abortion drug mifepristone.

item.title: Airfare amid Iran war: Buy now or wait out the conflict? Experts weigh the risks
item.description: It could be risky to delay buying plane tickets and hoping fares will drop, according to travel experts.

item.title: OPEC+ set for another oil output quota hike despite Hormuz closure, sources say
item.description: The output increase will remain largely on paper as long as the U.S.-Iran war continues to disrupt Gulf oil supplies.

item.title: Musk testimony dominated first week Musk v. Altman. 'You can't just steal a charity'
item.description: Elon Musk, the world's richest person, took the stand and testified over the course of three days in his trial against OpenAI CEO Sam Altman.

item.title: JPMorgan's best stock ideas heading into May
item.description: The firm has an updated list of top ideas as the new trading month commences.

item.title: Apollo Sports Capital and Tom Dundon make landmark $225 million investment in pickleball
item.description: The fresh funds bring the total investment in Pickleball Inc. to $315 million, as investors continue to look at emerging sports as a place to park their money.

item.title: Why you won't find Kentucky Derby bets on prediction platforms
item.description: The Kentucky Derby takes place Saturday in Louisville. Prediction market platforms like Kalshi and Polymarket are sitting the race out.

item.title: Jim Cramer says the market powered through a tough earnings week but 'that doesn't mean we're out of the woods yet'
item.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer looks to the jam-packed earnings week ahead and explains what he's looking for.

item.title: Private credit turns to financial alchemy as an antidote to 'peak anxiety'
item.description: Default rates are elevated and credit managers are getting creative.

item.title: Weight loss and hair loss: The growing hair treatment market from GLP-1s
item.description: A common side effect of many GLP-1 drugs is hair loss. It's creating a formerly untapped but growing market for hair treatment products.

item.title: Spirit Airlines shut down. Here's what travelers need to know if they have tickets
item.description: What travelers who are ticketed on Spirit Airlines need to know.

item.title: The U.S.-Iran war is coming for your credit score and mortgage application
item.description: The U.S.-Iran war and Strait of Hormuz closure have caused a global economic ripple effect, your credit score included as banks and lenders get tighter.

item.title: Exxon Mobil CEO expects higher oil prices due to Iran war: ‘The market hasn’t seen the full impact’
item.description: Oil prices have soared on the risk of escalation and then plunged on hopes for peace before repeating the cycle.

item.title: Netflix’s 'Beef' highlights a $5,000 deductible — how to handle your own healthcare costs
item.description: A scene in the new season of Netflix's show "Beef," about a high health insurance deductible, illustrates a pain many Americans experience.

item.title: From laundromat to millions: Codie Sanchez on buying her first business — and the steps to acquire your own
item.description: Codie Sanchez shares tips on buying a business, plus where to find ones for sale.

item.title: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq kept their record rallies going. Here are 3 key takeaways
item.description: It seemed like what really captivated Wall Street though was corporate earnings.

item.title: Gas prices are high right now. Use these 6 tools to save on fuel
item.description: From joining a wholesale club to using memberships you may already have, these are our tips for saving at the pump.

item.title: Germany urges stronger European defense after U.S. reduces troops
item.description: The Pentagon announced on Friday that the U.S. would withdraw 5,000 soldiers from Germany, its largest European base.

item.title: Trump tells Congress hostilities in Iran 'have terminated' as war powers deadline hits
item.description: Trump said there "is tremendous discord" among Iran's leaders, which has complicated efforts to end the war that the United States began in late February.

item.title: Bard College President Leon Botstein retiring after Jeffrey Epstein ties detailed
item.description: Bard College's long-time leader Leon Botstein has faced pressure since the DOJ released documents about his communications with Jeffrey Epstein.

item.title: S&P 500 closes at a new record to usher in May as oil prices cool and Apple rises: Live updates
item.description: The S&P 500 rose to a fresh all-time intraday high on Friday, boosted by Apple shares, while oil prices fell as a new month of trading got underway.

item.title: Trump says he's raising EU auto tariffs to 25%
item.description: The Supreme Court struck down Trump's "reciprocal" tariffs earlier this year, and Europe warned that its trade deal with Washington could be in jeopardy.

item.title: Engine trouble ahead? How the Strait of Hormuz standoff threatens luxury auto giants
item.description: Supercar engines rely on base oils because they can withstand extreme heat, high revs and intense pressure.

item.title: Pirro keeps pressure on Fed's Powell despite dropping probe
item.description: The U.S. attorney is expected to imminently appeal a ruling blocking her investigation of the Fed's cost overruns.

item.title: Apple's stock gains as company execs cite iPhone, Mac demand in boosting guidance
item.description: On its quarterly earnings call, Apple said revenue growth in the current quarter would be between 14% and 17%, well above analysts' estimates.
